name: Lipton Onion Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Use one of the following Recipe Soup mixes in this recipe: Onion, Onion-Mushroom, or Beefy Mushroom Mix.
2. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and shape into 8 patties.
3. Grill or broil until done. Serve if desired, on hamburger buns.
Microwave:
1. Prepare patties as above.
2. Place 4 patties in an oblong baking dish uncovered and heat on high (Full Power) for 6 minutes, turning the patties once.
3. Repeat with remaining patties. Let stand, covered, at least 5 minutes. Serve as above.
Note:
You can cover the dish with paper towels to prevent splattering inside the oven, but do not cover with any type of lid. Also, drain the grease from the pan when putting in the second batch of burgers or if using regular ground beef, turn them once.
